title: Blighted End
description: A Mod that aims to change the End.
body:
by: lamon_damon - V0.3.5

The End is corrupted by a terrifying... uhm... corruption...? Try to navigate through the dimension, and find out what's happening...

 
This is a Mod that aims to improve the End Dimension's boring and plain features. Since there's been absolutely no change to The End since 1.9, I wanted to take it upon myself to change The End in a way I saw fitting!

It adds various new items and blocks to play around with and changes the boring End generation with some new blocks! This Mod adds: Corrupted Ore,
                                                              Corrupted Ingots,
                                                              Corrupted Weapons/Tools,
                                                              and the Corrupted Block.
                                                              and so much more!
Of course, more will be added over time!

Have Fun!

CurseForge Version: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blighted-end
